MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mike Vejraska, defendant and moving party in propria persona, 415-571-3002
Jak Marquiez, Esq. of Beckman & Marquiez, 415-495-8500, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party American Hotels

RULING:
Re:DEFENDANT MIKE VEJRASKA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND,
The Court SET ASIDE The DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND per stipulation and order filed on April 12, 2005. This matter was recalled at 11 am. Defendant will file an answer by 12pm April 12, 2005 (301/DM/CT) Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR: 4819

Argued. DEFENDANT MIKE VEJRASKA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to April 12, 2005. (301/JLW/CT) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
